final_prompt.prompt:
Create a banner-style editorial photo for a Weibo news/hot-topic feature.

Style/medium: must be documentary photography aesthetic with professional photojournalism quality — exact camera settings are yours
Composition: must be 16:9 horizontal wide format with ample negative space for text overlay, panoramic cityscape framing
Subject: must include city skyline at dusk, pedestrians in motion, high-rise buildings reflecting sunset glow
Scene/backdrop: must be urban dusk setting with neon lights beginning to illuminate, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, authentic on-location atmosphere
Lighting/mood: needs a cinematic dusk atmosphere with theatrical light-dark contrast — exact exposure balance is yours
Color palette: needs a warm-cool twilight direction — exact tonal gradation is yours
Materials/textures: needs high-resolution surface treatment with sharp detail — exact grain structure is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "城市里的安静时刻" (large, prominent, bold/modern typeface), "黄昏，总能治愈一天的匆忙" (secondary, smaller), "@龙爪槐守望者real · 生活观察" (watermark, bottom or lower-right corner)
Constraints: must preserve 16:9 aspect ratio strictly, horizontal panoramic layout with text-safe margins, authentic documentary feel
Avoid: must avoid oversaturated artificial look, must avoid cluttered composition that compromises text readability
